title: Smoked Citrus Delight Ramekin
description: A sour, shattering dessert from Uruguay, featuring smoked citrus and Grand Marnier, served in individual ramekins.

ingredients.name: Crushed macrobiotic-friendly graham crackers
ingredients.notes: Use a food processor to finely chop.

ingredients.name: Smoked lemon zest
ingredients.notes: Use a zester or a fine grater.

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the ramekins on it.
Melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add the smoked oranges, Grand Marnier, and smoked salt to the saucepan and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix together the honey and yogurt until well combined.
Spoon the yogurt mixture into the ramekins, followed by a layer of smoked oranges and Grand Marnier mixture.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves and serve immediately.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
To make the smoked salt, mix 1/4 cup of kosher salt with 1 tsp of liquid smoke and 1 tsp of water in a small bowl. Let sit at room temperature for 24 hours before using.
